features.name: enum .name() method in parametric module scope
features.description: Code should include an enum type with a .name() method call inside a parameterized module

features.name: enum typedef with logic base type
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef using logic as the base type
features.snippet: typedef enum logic [1:0] { A, B, C } e_t;

features.name: enum name table var in $unit scope
features.description: Code should include enum name table variable (__Venumtab_enum_name) that gets placed in $unit scope with duplicate references
